# Sophi — AI CV Builder for Pakistani Professionals
# https://joinsophi.com

## About Sophi
Sophi is an AI-powered CV transformation platform. Users upload their existing CV (PDF or DOCX) and receive a fully rewritten, ATS-optimized career document powered by Kimi AI (Moonshot). The service includes a 5-dimension ATS score report, STAR-metric achievement bullets, 500+ industry keywords, LinkedIn optimizer, cover letter, gap analysis, and PDF export in 49 professional templates. Price: 1500 PKR.

## Key Pages
- Homepage: https://joinsophi.com
- How it works: https://joinsophi.com/how-it-works
- Pricing: https://joinsophi.com/pricing
- Templates: https://joinsophi.com/templates
- Blog: https://joinsophi.com/blog

## AI Crawlers
GPTBot: allowed
Google-Extended: allowed
PerplexityBot: allowed
ClaudeBot: allowed
Anthropic-ai: allowed
